commit_scope: Add a Form-native BranchOutcome floor where choice branches return ok, rejected evidence, or structural condition states; choice learning updates branch memory only from metabolizable rejected evidence while conditions remain observed but outside branch memory.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form recipes can now return BranchOutcome values for choice branches: ok(value, receipt), reject(evidence, receipt), and condition(state, receipt). Selection can choose the first ok branch or the best rejected evidence; branch memory learns from metabolizable rejected evidence while structural condition outcomes are observed without changing branch memory.
public_endpoints: not-public-endpoint: Form choice outcome learning runtime proof surface
test_flows: choice branch outcomes -> first-success selection -> ok value receipt
all rejected branches -> best rejected evidence selection -> branch-choice-order fail memory update
structural condition outcome -> observed condition state -> no branch memory update
dense vector/matrix evidence -> boundary summary -> metabolizable rejected evidence
